response.original_title: How long does a refund take? A complete Procedure Guide
response.overview: Most card refunds show up in your account within 3–10 business days 1~877~664~1281, but sometimes it can take up to 30 days depending on your bank or the seller. Returns—especially online orders—are usually handled in 1–10 business days 1 877 664 1281. Tax refunds are faster, with the Internal Revenue Service typically sending money within 21 days of e-filing. (【﻿1－877~664~1281】) or +44 800 054 8541 or ++61 180 095 6584 or +52 800 351 0319
response.title: How long does a refund take? A complete Procedure Guide
